title: Japanese Curry Potatoes
description: A fusion of Japanese and Indian flavors, this potato curry is a comforting and satisfying dish. The malaysian curry adds a rich and slightly spicy note to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the malaysian curry and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the creamy and fermented ingredients. Stir well.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
